title: Federation Request Envelope — v2.0.0
description: Transport-neutral cross-organ invocation envelope. Every capability call across the arifOS Federation MUST carry this envelope. Transport profile: MCP (current), REST, A2A (future).

schema_ref.description: URI to the exact schema used, for consumer validation

schema_hash.description: SHA-256 of the schema document, pinned at ratification

invocation_id.description: Unique ID for this single invocation. Survives retries (idempotency key).

parent_invocation_id.description: Parent invocation for nested or chained calls

trace_id.description: Trace ID across all hops in a single workflow. Same trace_id for all related invocations.

hop_index.description: Monotonically increasing hop counter. source_organ starts at 0.

session_id.description: arifOS session ID. Required for all governed calls.

actor_id.description: Authenticated actor identity (human or relay agent).

capability_id.description: Which capability is being invoked (tool name, endpoint, etc.). Transport-agnostic.

epistemic_tag.description: Epistemic class of the payload. GEOX → OBSERVED. WEALTH → COMPUTED.

evidence_refs.description: Prior receipt hashes this invocation depends on.

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 of the payload. Enables integrity verification independent of transport.

source_release.description: Source release identifier (git commit SHA) of the calling organ.

source_manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of the calling organ's capability manifest at invocation time.

action_class.description: What class of action this invocation requests.

mutation.description: Does this invocation mutate state? True for writes, deployments, seals.

reversible.description: Can this invocation be rolled back? False for seals, deletes.

authority_band.description: Authority band: OBSERVE_ONLY | LIMITED_MUTATE | FULL_MUTATE | SOVEREIGN.

judge_receipt_ref.description: arifOS judge receipt hash. Required for EXECUTE class.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated key for duplicate detection. Same key = same logical invocation.

max_attempts.description: Maximum allowed attempts before the client should abandon.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when this invocation was created.

deadline_at.description: RFC 3339 deadline. Invocation is invalid after this time.

payload.description: Organ-specific capability payload. Schema defined per capability.
